summary: Phase 7 SharePoint Hybrid Sync — comprehensive backend pytest suite added and all 22 tests pass. Covered: /status always-free, premium gate OFF (402 on plan/pull/push), premium ON flips status, full pull/push round-trip via BIGHAT_SYNC_REMOTE_FIXTURE, convergence after round-trip, sync state persistence (last_pull/last_push), delete_missing, path traversal safety, and gate re-engagement after flipping subscription off. All previous-phase regression suites (phase2/3/5/6 = 108 tests) still pass. Subscription restored to OFF and all TEST_ artefacts cleaned.
critical_code_review_comments: sync_service._plan() uses size-only diff (mtime skipped due to TZ skew). Documented in code but means in-place edits that preserve byte count will be missed — acceptable trade-off but worth a hash-based verify mode for production if users edit pptx files in situ.

sync_router.sync_plan/pull/push wrap exceptions in a broad 500 with str(e). Path-traversal ValueError currently flows through _safe_local_path only during pull/push apply — the plan() path does not call _safe_local_path (since it only enumerates). This is fine because _walk_local/_walk_remote is scoped to sync_root_rel, but the traversal safety test confirmed no file leakage.
record_sync_run() writes to db.sync_state with _id='last_pull'/'last_push'. get_sync_state() uses projection {_id:0} which correctly strips the ObjectId-shaped key — good.
LocalAssetService is re-instantiated per request inside _remote_service() when fixture is set; minor cost, acceptable for dev fixture.

subscription.set_subscription() auto-enables all feature flags when active=True+tier=premium with no feature_flags provided; request body of {active:true, tier:'premium', cloud_sync_enabled:true} works but also sets sharepoint_enabled + story_generator_enabled — document that or accept as intended.
test_credentials: Not required (open subscription toggle in native mode).
seed_data_creation: Each test run seeds a unique /cloud_fixture/01_Trivia/Web App/00_Builder/01_Hosts/TEST_sync_{uuid}.pptx file, exercises pull, pushes a TEST_local_only_{uuid}.pptx back, and cleans all TEST_* artefacts on teardown. Subscription forced OFF on teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 7 sync router is fully tested at /app/backend/tests/test_phase7_sync_native.py. Tests are idempotent — they seed unique files per run and clean up. BIGHAT_SYNC_REMOTE_FIXTURE is set in /app/backend/.env pointing to /app/backend/native/data/cloud_fixture. Subscription toggle endpoint POST /api/native/subscription with {active, tier, cloud_sync_enabled} is used to open/close the premium gate. Regression: phase2/3/5/6 still 108/108 green.
rca of the issue: No issues found — all Phase 7 flows behaved as specified.
